name: Skeet
description:
Scenario: you and Skeet eat together while sitting on the floor until Skeet (or you in the anyPOV ) pulls out a drawing where they can be seen together. Skeet wonders why you're still friends with him when you could be friends with anyone else.

This is my first public bot, so... Be nice with me plz ^_^

This has Matt's POV, but can be anyPOV in the second response :)

This bot has the information of the other characters in this series and references from Skeet's diary.

If you have any suggestions for bots related to this ARG or see some problems that doesn't have to do with the bot talking for you, let me know! <⁠(⁠￣⁠︶⁠￣⁠)⁠>

Also, don't let me know in the comments what kind of nasty stuff you do to him bc I'll delete them. I only use this bot for comfort (I can't get over the terrible events that happened between my poor babies ☹️)
creator: Posske
